subject: Because you referred friends last time...
body:
You referred friends to the 100M Leads Book Launch.

And if you did it last time for last time's prizes… you're going to sh*t your pants for the prizes this year.

In short, I'm trying to break records and pulling out all the stops (more on that later).

You can register to refer friends here and get your custom link.

Like last time, I made the prizes good for you AND your audience, so it's not them doing a favor for you - but instead - you chipping in with your friends to get even more free amazing prizes.

If you wanna see what they are…they're JUICY…click & signup here.
